risk_matrix: High: Funds in transit; Low: Funds withdrawn/laundered
legal_statute_mapping: IT Act 2000; BNSS Sec 111 (Organized Crime); RBI Circular 2017/18
tactical_action_guide: 1. Immediate 'Lien' request to Bank; 2. Portal 1930 Registration; 3. Digital footprint logging
emergency_escalation_protocol: Escalate to Nodal Officer (Bank) -> RBI Ombudsman -> Writ of Mandamus if Police inaction
evidence_preservation_strategy: Hash-log of screenshots; UPI Transaction IDs; IP Address logs (if available)
document_generation_requirements: Formal Dispute Form; Affidavit of Non-authorization; Copy of 1930 Acknowledgement

risk_matrix: Critical: Physical threat to life; Moderate: Emotional/Economic abuse
tactical_action_guide: 1. Secure Physical Perimeter; 2. DIR (Domestic Incident Report) via Protection Officer; 3. Medical Legal Certificate (MLC)
emergency_escalation_protocol: Move for 'Ex-Parte' Interim Protection Order (Sec 23 PWDV); Immediate Shelter Home requisition
evidence_preservation_strategy: Audio/Video recordings of threats; Medical prescriptions; Witness statements from neighbors
document_generation_requirements: DIR Template; Petition for Maintenance/Residence; Application for Custody

risk_matrix: High: Retaliation risk (Quid Pro Quo); Hostile environment
legal_statute_mapping: BNS Sec 74-78; POSH Act 2013; Vishaka Guidelines
tactical_action_guide: 1. Written notice to ICC/LC; 2. Statement u/s 164 CrPC; 3. Request for interim leave/transfer
emergency_escalation_protocol: Appeal to District Officer (POSH) -> High Court Writ for ICC negligence -> FIR u/s 166A for Police lapse
evidence_preservation_strategy: Metadata-stamped screenshots; Email headers; Diary of incidents (Contemporaneous notes)
document_generation_requirements: Formal ICC Complaint; Request for Conciliation/Inquiry; Witness list with contact details

tactical_action_guide: 1. Registered Post to SP/SSP; 2. Written representation to DM; 3. Demand for 'Zero FIR' if jurisdictional issue
emergency_escalation_protocol: File Section 156(3) Application before Magistrate to order FIR registration
evidence_preservation_strategy: Photographic proof of station visit; Video of refusal (if safe); Post Receipt of complaint
document_generation_requirements: Formal Representation to SP; Section 156(3) Application; Contempt notice to SHO

risk_matrix: Emergency: Immediate life threat; High: Prolonged detention
tactical_action_guide: 1. Alert nearby people; 2. Note vehicle details; 3. Call 112 immediately
emergency_escalation_protocol: Contact NIA if interstate; File habeas corpus if minor involved
evidence_preservation_strategy: Photographs of last seen location; Witness statements; Clothing fibers if struggle occurred
document_generation_requirements: Kidnapping FIR Template; Missing Person Report; Medical Examination Request

risk_matrix: High: Weapon involved; Moderate: Unarmed attack
legal_statute_mapping: IPC Sec 323-326; BNSS Sec 79-82 (Voluntarily Causing Hurt)
tactical_action_guide: 1. Seek immediate medical attention; 2. Document injuries with photos; 3. Report to nearest police station
emergency_escalation_protocol: Approach Sessions Court for fast-track trial; Claim compensation under Victim Compensation Scheme
evidence_preservation_strategy: Medical reports; Injury photographs; Weapon if recovered; Witness affidavits
document_generation_requirements: Assault FIR; Medical Legal Certificate (MLC); Compensation Application

risk_matrix: Emergency: Armed robbery; High: Gang involvement
tactical_action_guide: 1. Do not resist if armed; 2. Note suspect descriptions; 3. Secure scene for evidence
emergency_escalation_protocol: File robbery FIR; Request CCTV footage from nearby establishments
evidence_preservation_strategy: Property recovery tracking; Fingerprints on stolen items; DNA evidence if applicable
document_generation_requirements: Robbery FIR; Property Valuation Report; Insurance Claim Form

risk_matrix: Moderate: Residential break-in; Low: Commercial premises
tactical_action_guide: 1. Do not enter premises; 2. Call police immediately; 3. Assess damage from outside
emergency_escalation_protocol: File burglary FIR; Coordinate with insurance company
evidence_preservation_strategy: Footprint casts; Tool marks on locks; Fingerprints on surfaces
document_generation_requirements: Burglary FIR; Property Inventory; Insurance Claim Documentation

risk_matrix: Emergency: Immediate medical emergency; Critical: Permanent disability
legal_statute_mapping: IPC Sec 326A-326B; BNSS Sec 82 (Voluntarily Causing Grievous Hurt)
tactical_action_guide: 1. Flush affected area with water; 2. Seek emergency medical care; 3. Preserve clothing/chemical container
emergency_escalation_protocol: File under acid attack special provisions; Approach acid attack survivor support groups
evidence_preservation_strategy: Medical reports; Chemical analysis of residue; CCTV footage; Witness statements
document_generation_requirements: Acid Attack FIR; Disability Certificate; Compensation Claim

risk_matrix: Moderate: Emotional distress; High: Physical abuse involved
legal_statute_mapping: Dowry Prohibition Act 1961; IPC Sec 498A; BNSS Sec 85
tactical_action_guide: 1. Document harassment instances; 2. Seek family mediation; 3. Report to police if threats
emergency_escalation_protocol: File dowry harassment FIR; Seek protection order under PWDV Act
evidence_preservation_strategy: Harassment diaries; Gift deeds; Bank transaction proofs; Audio recordings
document_generation_requirements: Dowry Harassment FIR; Protection Order Application; Maintenance Petition

risk_matrix: Emergency: Physical/sexual abuse; Critical: Life threat
legal_statute_mapping: POCSO Act 2012; IPC Sec 354-375; BNSS Sec 76-78
tactical_action_guide: 1. Remove child from danger; 2. Seek medical examination; 3. Report to Child Welfare Committee
emergency_escalation_protocol: File FIR under POCSO; Involve Child Helpline 1098; Approach Juvenile Justice Board
evidence_preservation_strategy: Medical examination reports; Age verification documents; Abuse documentation
document_generation_requirements: POCSO FIR; Child Protection Application; Custody Order Request

risk_matrix: Moderate: Financial exploitation; High: Physical neglect
legal_statute_mapping: Maintenance & Welfare of Parents Act 2007; IPC Sec 498A; BNSS Sec 85
tactical_action_guide: 1. Assess immediate safety needs; 2. Contact family members; 3. Report to police/social services
emergency_escalation_protocol: File elder abuse complaint; Seek maintenance orders; Approach Senior Citizen Helpline
evidence_preservation_strategy: Medical certificates; Financial transaction records; Neglect evidence
document_generation_requirements: Elder Abuse FIR; Maintenance Application; Protection Order

legal_statute_mapping: IT Act Sec 66E; BNSS Sec 111 (Organized Crime)
tactical_action_guide: 1. Document all communications; 2. Report to platform moderators; 3. File cybercrime complaint
emergency_escalation_protocol: Approach Cyber Crime Cell; Request content takedown; Seek psychological counseling
evidence_preservation_strategy: Screenshots with timestamps; IP logs; Platform moderation reports
document_generation_requirements: Cyberbullying Complaint; Content Takedown Request; Restraining Order

risk_matrix: High: Persistent threats; Moderate: Unwanted messages
legal_statute_mapping: IT Act Sec 66A-66E; BNSS Sec 74-78 (Criminal Intimidation)
tactical_action_guide: 1. Block harassers; 2. Preserve all evidence; 3. Report to cybercrime portal
emergency_escalation_protocol: File harassment FIR; Seek protection order; Change contact details
evidence_preservation_strategy: Email headers; Call logs; Social media posts; Location tracking data
document_generation_requirements: Online Harassment FIR; Protection Order Application; Contact Change Affidavit

risk_matrix: Emergency: Immediate life threat; Critical: Weapon involved
legal_statute_mapping: IPC Sec 307; BNSS Sec 79 (Attempt to Murder)
tactical_action_guide: 1. Seek immediate medical care; 2. Call 112; 3. Go to safe location
emergency_escalation_protocol: File attempt to murder FIR; Request police protection; Approach fast-track court
evidence_preservation_strategy: Medical reports; Injury documentation; Weapon recovery; Forensic evidence
document_generation_requirements: Murder Attempt FIR; Protection Application; Fast-Track Trial Request

risk_matrix: Emergency: Medical/psychological crisis; Critical: Gang rape
legal_statute_mapping: IPC Sec 375-376; POCSO Act 2012; BNSS Sec 76-77
tactical_action_guide: 1. Do not wash/change clothes; 2. Seek medical examination; 3. Report to One Stop Centre
emergency_escalation_protocol: File rape FIR; Undergo forensic examination; Seek counseling support
evidence_preservation_strategy: Medical examination reports; Forensic evidence collection; Clothing preservation
document_generation_requirements: Rape FIR; Forensic Examination Request; Victim Support Application

risk_matrix: High: Threats to life/family; Moderate: Property damage threats
tactical_action_guide: 1. Do not pay demanded amount; 2. Record all communications; 3. Report to police
emergency_escalation_protocol: File extortion FIR; Request caller ID tracing; Seek protection for family
evidence_preservation_strategy: Recorded calls/messages; Transaction proofs; Threat documentation
document_generation_requirements: Extortion FIR; Protection Order; Caller ID Tracing Request
